occlusion_relevance.user_tendencies: IF dining context involves working on a laptop positioned to the user's right AND affective state is unspecified/neutral AND food has no special sauce dependence, THEN minimize right occlusion BECAUSE the user explicitly chose to preserve visibility/access to the right-side workspace.

transfer_mode.user_tendencies: Inside mouth transfer is the stable default because the user cannot lean forward due to limited trunk control. No context-dependent variation observed yet.

outside_mouth_distance.user_tendencies: IF transfer_mode is inside mouth transfer, THEN not applicable BECAUSE outside-mouth distance does not apply and the user's physical abilities support inside-mouth transfer as the observed choice.

bite_dipping_preference.user_tendencies: IF food includes a dip or sauce such as ketchup AND dining context involves working on a laptop AND affective state is unspecified/neutral, THEN do not dip BECAUSE the user chose to avoid added mess during a task-focused meal.

wait_before_autocontinue_seconds.user_tendencies: IF dining context involves working on a laptop AND affective state is unspecified/neutral, THEN 10 sec BECAUSE the user preferred rapid automation and minimal waiting.
